emails.body: Spike quote from LATimes story today About time. "Doesn't David Freeman more properly belong in that same jail cell as the guy called Spike than he does in the governor's office?" Johnson asked. Sue Mara Enron Corp. Tel: (415) 782-7802 Fax:(415) 782-7854
